tools.name: bankAccount.createBankAccount
tools.description: Create a new bank account. Returns a bank account object if the create is succeded.

tools.name: bankAccount.deleteBankAccount
tools.description: Delete an existing bank account.

tools.name: bankAccount.getBankAccount
tools.description: Retrieves the details of an existing bank account.

tools.name: bankAccount.listBankAccount
tools.description: Returns a list of your bank accounts. The bank accounts are returned sorted by creation date, with the most recent bank account appearing first.

tools.name: bankAccount.updateBankAccount
tools.description: Update an existing bank accounts. Returns a bank account object if the update is succeded.

tools.name: currency.getConversionRate
tools.description: Return with the exchange value of given currencies.

tools.description: Cancel a document. Returns a cancellation document object if the cancellation is succeded.

tools.description: Create a new document. Returns a document object if the create is succeded.

tools.description: Create a new document from proforma. Returns a document object if the create is succeded.

tools.name: document.deletePayment
tools.description: Delete all exist payment history on document.

tools.description: Download a document. Returns a document in PDF format.

tools.description: Retrieves the details of an existing document status.

tools.name: document.getPayment
tools.description: Retrieves the details of payment history an existing document.

tools.name: document.getPublicUrl
tools.description: Retrieves public url to download an existing document.

tools.name: document.listDocument
tools.description: Returns a list of your documents. The documents are returned sorted by creation date, with the most recent documents appearing first.

tools.name: document.sendDocument
tools.description: Returns a list of emails, where the invoice is sent.

tools.name: document.updatePayment
tools.description: Update payment history an existing document. Returns a payment history object if the update is succeded.

tools.name: documentBlock.listDocumentBlock
tools.description: Returns a list of your document blocks. The document blocks are returned sorted by creation date, with the most recent document blocks appearing first.

tools.name: organization.getOrganizationData
tools.description: Retrieves the data of organization.

tools.name: partner.listPartner
